name: Casa de Cambio Hispana Check Cashing
description_short: ACE Cash Express location in Albuquerque offering check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and prepaid banking services without requiring a bank account.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates a check-cashing location at 333 Montano Rd NW in Albuquerque, New Mexico. The company is part of the ACE Cash Express national network, which has established itself as a financial services provider for the underbanked and unbanked populations seeking alternatives to traditional banking.

The Albuquerque location offers a comprehensive suite of financial services centered on check cashing but extending well beyond it. Services include cashing most types of checks with only a valid government-issued ID (no bank account required), money orders through MoneyGram, domestic and international money transfers, bill payment services for rent and utilities, ATM access, tax refund check cashing, and business check cashing. Additionally, they offer three banking products: Porte (a mobile banking app with in-person support), Flare Account (online banking), and ACE Elite Visa Prepaid Debit Card, all partnered with Pathward, National Association (FDIC-member).

What distinguishes this location is extended service hours compared to traditional banks (open 9 AM–7 PM weekdays, 9 AM–5 PM Saturday) and the ability to handle large cash amounts for business checks. The company positions itself on convenience and accessibility for customers without traditional bank accounts, offering multiple payment and transfer options under one roof with competitive fee structures for check cashing and business services.

The honest assessment is that while ACE provides genuine accessibility and convenience for check cashing and basic financial services, the model inherently involves transaction fees that traditional banks do not charge. Customers relying on this service regularly will incur ongoing costs for basic financial operations, making it more expensive over time than maintaining a bank account, though the low barrier to entry (ID only) serves those unable to access traditional banking.
address: 1720 Bridge Blvd SW suite J 2, Albuquerque, NM 87105

company_info.headquarters: 1720 Bridge Blvd SW suite J 2, Albuquerque, NM 87105

pros: No bank account required to cash checks—only valid government-issued ID needed
Extended business hours (9 AM–7 PM weekdays) compared to most traditional banks
Handles large cash amounts for business check cashing on-site
MoneyGram money transfer services available domestically and to 200+ countries and territories
Multiple banking products available (Porte, Flare Account, ACE Elite Card) through FDIC-member Pathward
Bill payment services available both in-store and online for utilities, rent, and credit cards
Tax refund check cashing and cash withdrawal services for tax cards
cons: Check cashing and money services involve transaction fees not disclosed on website
Limited to one physical location in Albuquerque; requires travel to that specific address
Reliance on this service creates ongoing costs that exceed free checking at traditional banks
No pricing transparency provided on website for check cashing or money order fees
Sunday hours unavailable, limiting weekend access compared to some competitors
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals without access to traditional checking accounts
Self-employed business owners needing to cash business checks with same-day service
Customers sending international money transfers via MoneyGram to family or businesses
People receiving tax refunds on prepaid cards who need immediate cash access
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express Albuquerque is best for unbanked consumers and small business owners who need convenient check cashing and money transfer services without a bank account requirement. The primary caveat is that regular use involves transaction fees that accumulate over time, making it significantly more expensive than traditional banking for routine financial operations.
services: Check cashing (most types, no account required)
MoneyGram money transfers (domestic and international to 200+ countries)
Bill payment (in-store and online for utilities, rent, credit cards)
Porte mobile banking app with in-person support
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
Cash loading to prepaid debit cards
